prose:
**Water frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit, PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on supplied water.xyz (3 atoms: O, H, H); not re-optimized at DFT. SCF converged in 7 cycles. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). HOMO = −8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV. Integrity status: OK (trustworthy). No warnings reported. Calculation ran via PySCF at the level B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting enabled (chemkit default).</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
